places.name: Men Men Don Don (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Works if you crave Japanese comfort food and we have enough time.

places.name: White Restaurant (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Choose this if you feel like you should eat something healthy.

places.name: Nan Yang Dao (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Good place when we don't feel like eating Japanese, Western, or Chinese-style heavy and want to sit down.

places.name: Saizeriya (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Use this if you don't know what to eat. Does not work if you feel very hungry, you'll need to wait for a table.

places.name: Sushi Express (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Great recommendation if you are unsure what to eat. Does not work if you want hot food. Don't take this around 19:00, you'll wait for a seat.

places.name: Fusion Western Cuisine (361 Coffee Shop)
places.personal_notes: Works if there are work calls later at night. Does not work if Tobi has to work late. Takeout only.

places.name: D'Rubinah (Sembawang Drive)
places.personal_notes: Works if we eat very late. Does not work if we don't feel like walking far.

places.name: Wingstop (Sembawang Shopping Centre)
places.personal_notes: Only works if the next day is not a working day.

places.name: Lele Wanton Noodles (313 Coffee Shop)
places.personal_notes: Works if we just want to grab something. Works if we want to drop our stuff at home first. Does not work if we eat late.

places.name: Gong Yuan Ma La Tang (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Works if we want something soupy. Pairs well with Tobi grabbing Dabba Street takeout while Chloe takes the Ma La Tang.

places.name: Dabba Street (Sun Plaza)
places.personal_notes: Works as a takeout pairing for Tobi when Chloe is craving Ma La Tang.
